plugins.name: android_gradle
plugins.description: Android Gradle 构建日志脱水

plugins.name: artifact_summary
plugins.description: Build artifact summary compaction for SARIF security/code scanning results and JUnit XML test reports

plugins.name: ci_log
plugins.description: CI/CD shell wrapper semantic compaction for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, Azure Pipelines, CircleCI, Buildkite, local act, TeamCity, Travis CI, and organization-specific banner logs

plugins.name: cloud_log
plugins.description: 主流云厂商日志外壳剥离（AWS/GCP/Azure/阿里云/OCI/腾讯云/华为云/Cloudflare），将 message/textPayload/content 等内层日志还原给专用日志插件

plugins.name: db_log
plugins.description: Database log compaction for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis slow/error/replication/runtime events

plugins.name: minify_code
plugins.description: Deprecated config-only entry; smart_code_plugin owns code compaction

plugins.name: spring_boot
plugins.description: Spring Boot 应用日志脱水

plugins.name: vcs_az
plugins.description: Azure DevOps CLI 输出脱水

plugins.name: vcs_repo
plugins.description: Android Repo 命令输出脱水

plugins.name: web_log
plugins.description: Web access log v3 semantic aggregation for Nginx, Apache, ingress, Uvicorn, Envoy/Istio, CloudFront/IIS W3C, Cloudflare, native ALB, and cloud-wrapped CSV/JSON/table/plain access logs with dictionaries, routine folding, noise diagnostics, scan/burst spotlight, anomalies, and slow request signals
